chapters.title: The Porch Swing
chapters.excerpt: Mara finds the last letter, and everything she thought she knew starts to unravel.
chapters.body:
Mara found the last letter tucked inside the porch swing, right where the cushion met the armrest, in a spot she must have sat beside a hundred times without ever noticing the loose seam.

The paper was soft with age, the ink gone the color of weak tea. She almost didn't open it. Some part of her already knew that whatever was inside would rearrange the furniture of her whole summer.

She opened it anyway.

*(Full chapter text goes here — replace this placeholder with your real writing in the CMS.)*
